channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats Cannot Explain Their Opposition to Voter ID. Republicans Won't Force Them To
item.description: Imagine Democrats having to defend their stance against photo ID and citizenship verification for voting, hour after hour, in the Senate.

item.title: Prevent Banks from Imposing Data-Rationing Fees
item.description: Regulators must guarantee consumers unrestricted access to their own financial data.

item.title: Senators Demand ICE Answers and Body Cameras After Two Fatal Shootings in Maine and Houston
item.description: Dozens of Democratic senators and an Independent senator from Maine pressed Immigration and Customs Enforcement on Monday for more details regarding...

item.title: Troy Jackson Emerges as Likely Maine Democratic Senate Pick After Graham Platner Withdraws
item.description: Troy Jackson, a former Maine lawmaker and fifth-generation logger from the North Maine Woods, has become the probable replacement for the state's...
